prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-METROSPEED-40PC-SET Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: KidPlay Urban City Diecast Cars Speed Racing Vehicle Play Set 40pc Description: Race through the city streets with this KidPlay Deluxe 40pc Diecast Metro City Speed Racing Micro Wheels Kid Complete Toy Car Play Set.

Your little one's imagination will race, as they create their own driving adventures with friends and family. This deluxe 40-piece city diecast car playset is excellent for hours of entertainment, both indoor and out. With an all-encompassing diecast race car rescue set, your child will be able to use their imagination for pretend play, while also improving their fine motor skills when handling and setting up all the play set race car components.

With an included city map featuring fundamental components of a cityscape such as a hospital, police station, school, airport and more, your child will be engrossed with opportunities for pretend play. The multi-piece Diecast City Race Car and Rescue Set includes a unique variety of car toys such as big rig trucks, performance race cars, an assortment of emergency vehicles and more. Along with the numerous transportation vehicles, this set provides multiple construction cones and road signs for your little city planner to create many imaginative town and car rescue scenarios.

Not only will your little race car driver in training be thrilled and occupied for hours with this full metro city diecast car set, he or she will be developing crucial early educational skills that will better help them to understand traffic and imagine city driving; your little toddler will also grow and develop their motor skills, as well as their creativity too. Search Terms: diecast cars diecast racecar city playset race car toys mini cars play set playmat city road map roadways street road playmat hospital bus station airport fire station police station police officer firefighter school construction Features: - DELUXE CITY RACING PLAY SET: Recreate the hustle and bustle of the busy city streets with this Deluxe 40 Piece Metro City Speed Racing Diecast Vehicle Play Set! Offering an abundance of choices from formula one race cars and sprint race cars, to a school bus and police vehicle, your child will be able to create endless city driving scenarios using the diecast cars and included play mat - IMAGINATIVE PRETEND PLAY: Your little speed racer can maneuver their vehicles down city streets on the included city map with this multi-piece diecast car vehicle speed racing toy set; With a wide variety of race cars, city vehicles and emergency vehicles, their imagination will spark constant creativity - EVER-EVOLVING PLAY TIME: The winding roads all around the provided city map allows your child to maneuver all their vehicles around the busy city, while taking on a different role each time they play; Whether it is a race car driver, a school bus driver or a police officer the pretend play role play opportunities are endless! - HELPS WITH DEVELOPMENTAL GROWTH: Not only will your little one be thrilled and occupied for hours with this Metro City Racing Diecast playset, he or she will be developing crucial early critical thinking and problem-solving skills, as well as developing their fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination when handling and setting up the play set - SPECIFICATIONS: Color: Multi; Material: Plastic, Metal; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+; Assembly Required: No; Batteries Required: No === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
